sections.title: Test Coverage Analysis Report
Overview
sections.content:
- **Source files**: 65 TypeScript files
- **Test files**: 11 integration tests
- **Exported functions/classes**: ~375 exports across 55 files
- **Test coverage**: ~17% (11/65 files have tests)

---

sections.title: 1. Untested Critical Modules
1.1 **Authentication & Security** (`api/auth-middleware.ts`)
1.2 **Module Loader** (`modules/loader.ts`)
1.3 **GOAP Planner** (`intelligence/goap-planner.ts`)
1.4 **Task Router** (`intelligence/task-router.ts`)
1.5 **Daemon Registry** (`daemon/registry.ts`)
1.6 **Health Monitor** (`api/health-monitor.ts`)
2. Edge Cases Not Covered
2.1 **Guardrails** (`guardrails/index.ts`)
sections.content:
- Retry exhaustion with different guardrails (max 2 vs max 5)
- Multiple guardrails failing on same attempt
- `parsedOutput` from jsonParse guardrail
- Agent error before guardrail check

sections.title: 2.2 **Module Loader**
sections.content:
- POST request body parsing with >1MB payload (should reject)
- Module route handler returns non-JSON
- Optional dependency that later becomes required

sections.title: 2.3 **GOAP Planner**
sections.content:
- Plan with >100 actions (scalability)
- Action with circular effects (A produces B, B produces A)
- Concurrent `executePlan` calls on same planId

---

sections.title: 3. Missing Error Handling Tests
3.1 **Auth Middleware**
3.2 **Module Loader**
sections.content:
- Module `init()` throws Error
- Module `ready()` promise never resolves (timeout test)
- Module registers duplicate route path
- Module route handler returns Promise that rejects

sections.title: 3.3 **Task Router**
sections.content:
- SQLite database corruption
- Outcome with missing required fields
- Division by zero in scoring (empty keyword set)

---

sections.title: 4. Integration Test Gaps
4.1 **Cross-Module Integration**
4.2 **Daemon Lifecycle Integration**
5. Security Test Gaps
5.1 **Command Injection** (agent spawner)
5.2 **Path Traversal** (module loader)
6. Performance Test Gaps
6.1 **Task Router Scalability**
6.2 **Module Loader Parallelism**
Summary
Critical Gaps (Fix First)
sections.content:
1. ✅ **Auth middleware** - Security critical, no tests
2. ✅ **Module loader** - Core system, complex logic, no tests
3. ✅ **GOAP planner** - Complex AI planning, no tests
4. ✅ **Task router** - ML scoring, no tests

sections.title: High Priority
sections.content:
5. ✅ Daemon registry heartbeat/liveness
6. ✅ Health monitor thresholds
7. ✅ Guardrails retry logic
8. ✅ Cross-module integration tests
9. ✅ Security: command injection, path traversal
10. ✅ Error handling: corrupted files, timeouts, concurrent access

sections.title: Estimated Test Count Needed
sections.content:
- **Current**: 11 test files (~100 test cases)
- **Recommended**: 25+ test files (~500+ test cases)
- **Coverage Goal**: 70%+ (currently ~17%)

---

sections.title: Next Steps
sections.content:
1. **Immediate**: Implement auth-middleware tests (security risk)
2. **Week 1**: Module loader + GOAP planner tests
3. **Week 2**: Task router + integration tests
4. **Ongoing**: Add tests alongside new features (TDD)
